section.heading: Authorizations of appropriations for Development Fund for Africa

content.p: Funds appropriated to carry out this part are authorized to be made available until expended. It is the sense of the Congress that the authority of this subsection 11 So in original. Probably should be “section”. should be used to extend the period of availability of those funds whenever appropriate to improve the quality of assistance provided under section 2293 of this title.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 2294, Pub. L. 87–195, pt. I, § 497, as added Pub. L. 95–92, § 4, Aug. 4, 1977, 91 Stat. 614, related to balance of payments loan for Portugal, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 99–83, title XII, § 1211(a)(4), Aug. 8, 1985, 99 Stat. 279, effective Oct. 1, 1985.
